meaning: adj.不仁慈的,刻薄的,无情的,不体谅的,不厚道的,不亲切的
examples: It's not in his nature to be unkind.
He was never actually unkind to them.
It would be unkind to go without him.
Its Oscar prospects are still uncertain because the Academy Awards are famously unkind to comedies.
She's always seeing the best in others and never has an unkind word for anyone.
